headlines.description: — Arthur Smith's goal was for the Atlanta Falcons to remain relevant in the NFC South.
headlines.shortLinkText: Heinicke lifts Falcons with clean play at quarterback in 29-10 win to cool Colts' playoff hopes

headlines.description: — The Seattle Seahawks are winning when it matters most, and they've put themselves right back in the mix for a playoff berth.
headlines.shortLinkText: Geno Smith, Seahawks improve playoff chances in rallying to beat the Titans

headlines.description: — Dan Campbell towered over the podium in a black T-shirt commemorating Detroit's first division title in 30 years, reveling in the moment as the bass from the locker room next door pulsated through the walls.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lions hang on to beat Vikings 30-24 and clinch 1st division title since 1993

events.name: Washington Commanders at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Trevor Siemian was able to laugh a little and let out a sigh of relief. And then the Jets quarterback perfectly summed up New York's nail-biter of a win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jets blow big lead vs. Commanders but win 30-28 on Zuerlein's 54-yard field goal with 5 seconds left

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — It's still early, but Jordan Love is beginning to show the poise and big-play capability that seem to be prerequisites for a Green Bay Packers quarterback.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jordan Love, Packers survive rally by Panthers, win 33-30 to keep playoff hopes alive

headlines.description: — After Amari Cooper grabbed a 53-yard reception on the game's first play Sunday, the Cleveland Browns star thought he'd be in for a big day.
headlines.shortLinkText: Amari Cooper has franchise-record 265 yards receiving to lead Browns to 36-22 win over Texans

events.name: Jacksonville Jaguars at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Baker Mayfield and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers are playing their best when the stakes are highest.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mayfield throws for 283 yards, 2 TDs as surging Bucs beat reeling Jaguars 30-12 for 4th straight win

headlines.description: — The Chicago Bears were rolling along with a comfortable lead before things got a little tense, only this time there was no big collapse.
headlines.shortLinkText: Justin Fields throws for a TD, runs for another score, leading the Bears past Cardinals 27-16

headlines.description: — Jason Sanders had waited all season for this moment. On a Miami Dolphins team that scores more touchdowns than any other in the NFL, the former All-Pro kicker hadn't needed to attempt many field goals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins nip Cowboys 22-20 on Jason Sanders' last-second field goal, secure playoff spot

events.name: New England Patriots at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — Bailey Zappe had a feeling this would be the New England Patriots' night when he coughed up the football at his 5-yard line on his very first snap and his defense bailed him out by...
headlines.shortLinkText: Chad Ryland's 56-yard field goal sends Patriots past Broncos 26-23 as Denver's playoff hopes dim
